result.stdout:
Description:
  Tcdx CLI

Usage:
  tcdx [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  unify <folder> <tcdx>  Unify the Tcdx file in the specified folder

commands.payload:
Description:
  Tcdx CLI

Usage:
  tcdx [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  unify <folder> <tcdx>  Unify the Tcdx file in the specified folder

result.stdout:
Description:
  Unify the Tcdx file in the specified folder

Usage:
  tcdx unify <folder> <tcdx> [options]

Arguments:
  <folder>  Path of the folder containing the Tcdx files to unify
  <tcdx>    Path of the output Tcdx file

Options:
  -r, --recursive  Include subfolders recursively [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Unify the Tcdx file in the specified folder

Usage:
  tcdx unify <folder> <tcdx> [options]

Arguments:
  <folder>  Path of the folder containing the Tcdx files to unify
  <tcdx>    Path of the output Tcdx file

Options:
  -r, --recursive  Include subfolders recursively [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help   Show help and usage information
